description: Multi-turn: create channel -> update filter -> test -> delete (covers `neomind message channel-update` + `channel-test` + `channel-delete`). channel-update uses --name flag + --config JSON; channel-delete/channel-test take name as positional arg.

turns.user: Create a webhook message channel named ops-critical pointing at https://example.com/hook.
Configure it to accept only messages with severity warning or higher.
Run a test delivery on this channel.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind message channel-create --name ops-critical --type webhook --config '{"url":"https://example.com/hook"}'`
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind message channel-update --name ops-critical --config '{"min_severity":"warning"}'` (filter config goes inside --config JSON)
Turn 3: Agent runs `neomind message channel-test ops-critical` (positional name)
Turn 4: Agent runs `neomind message channel-delete ops-critical` (positional name)
expectations.overall: Last three turns must reuse the channel name 'ops-critical'; turn 2 must express severity filter inside the --config JSON blob, not as a separate --min-severity flag
